title: Fight That Ghost
actors: Dewey 'Pigmeat' Markham, John Murray, Percy Verwayen
plot: Pigmeat and Shorty, who own "Pigmeat and Shorty's Bootery", are told by their landlord to either pay up or get out. They get caught trying to short-count him, and he threatens to have them arrested. After a series of disasters--th...
